description:
Move durable_version calculation from VersionDeterminationPhase to LogRecoveryPlanningPhase.

File: lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/log_recovery_planning_phase.ex

Add durable_version calculation from log_recovery_info_by_id:
```elixir
durable_version =
  log_recovery_info_by_id
  |> Map.values()
  |> Enum.map(&Map.get(&1, :minimum_durable_version))
  |> Enum.reject(&(&1 == :unavailable))
  |> Enum.min(fn -> Version.zero() end)
```

Change next phase return from VacancyCreationPhase to LogRecruitmentPhase.

Depends on: demux → log durability reporting being implemented.
title: Move version determination to LogRecoveryPlanningPhase
